environmentvariabledefinition.description: SQL connection endpoint URL for the Microsoft Fabric Lakehouse that contains employee data from Dynamics (PersonnelNumber, JobTitle, Company/LegalEntity). Used by Power Automate flows to validate employee eligibility and pull identity data on application submission.
environmentvariabledefinition.hint: Find in Microsoft Fabric workspace > Lakehouse > SQL analytics endpoint > Copy SQL connection string. Format: [workspace-id].datawarehouse.fabric.microsoft.com
